columns.name: PAT_MRN_ID
filters: p.PAT_ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT e.PAT_ID FROM PAT_ENC_HSP AS e JOIN HSP_ACCT_DX_LIST AS dl ON e.HSP_ACCOUNT_ID = dl.HSP_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN CLARITY_EDG AS dx ON dl.DX_ID = dx.DX_ID WHERE dx.ICD10_CODE LIKE 'I50%')

columns.name: PAT_FIRST_NAME
filters: p.PAT_ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT e.PAT_ID FROM PAT_ENC_HSP AS e JOIN HSP_ACCT_DX_LIST AS dl ON e.HSP_ACCOUNT_ID = dl.HSP_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN CLARITY_EDG AS dx ON dl.DX_ID = dx.DX_ID WHERE dx.ICD10_CODE LIKE 'I50%')

columns.name: PAT_LAST_NAME
filters: p.PAT_ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT e.PAT_ID FROM PAT_ENC_HSP AS e JOIN HSP_ACCT_DX_LIST AS dl ON e.HSP_ACCOUNT_ID = dl.HSP_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN CLARITY_EDG AS dx ON dl.DX_ID = dx.DX_ID WHERE dx.ICD10_CODE LIKE 'I50%')
